violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer, knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2023

Cheese, mayonnaise, and tartar sauce (that stated to keep refrigerated), was observed held at 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC voluntarily disposed of food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2023

The presence of ants is not controlled as evidenced by live activity observed in kitchen. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2023

The following equipment was observed in poor repair: 1) The refrigeration unit located in the kitchen: left fan did not turn on and unit was not holding adequate ambient temperature on that side 2) The hot water handles of the faucets at the three bay sinks were observed leaking New Violation. Correct By: 07/19/2023

The floor in the kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/19/2023
